windows.old_description: Setting a floating wick on the water candle.
windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring milky white liquid wax from a glass jug onto a water candle tumbler filled with white pebbles and dried purple lavender, lit pillar candle and orange berries beside magazine on white table
windows.summary_v2: A hand pours milky white liquid from a glass jug onto the surface of a water-filled tumbler containing white pebbles and dried lavender, forming a floating white wax layer.

tags_v2.action: pouring white liquid onto water candle surface
tags_v2.setting: white table with magazine and decor

seconds_v2.desc: A clear glass tumbler holds water, white pebbles and dried purple lavender; a lit pillar candle and orange-berry decor sit beside a magazine on a white table.
A small glass jug enters from the left and begins pouring milky white liquid onto the water surface of the tumbler.
The white liquid pours in, spreading a creamy film across the top of the water above the submerged pebbles and flower.
Pouring continues, the milky-white layer thickening over the water inside the glass.
More white liquid is added; a foamy opaque layer now floats on the surface around the lavender sprig.
The white poured layer grows denser, nearly covering the top of the tumbler's contents.
A ringed hand steadies the rim while the jug keeps pouring the creamy white liquid into the glass.
The white surface layer is almost complete, a thick opaque cap over the water, pebbles and flower.
Pouring finishes with a frothy swirl; the tumbler now shows a white top layer over clear water with pebbles and lavender below.
